description:
Myriel Villa – Elite Living with Stunning Coral Bay Views

Myriel Villa is an exclusive residence that combines impressive contemporary design with breathtaking sea views over Coral Bay.

Nestled in Peyia, one of Paphos' most picturesque areas, the villa offers a serene natural setting while ensuring easy access to all essential amenities, including supermarkets, charming taverns, fine restaurants, and private schools. At the same time, it is just moments away from the majestic sea caves and crystal-clear waters of the Mediterranean.

Designed with modern elegance, this luxurious 4-bedroom villa features a spacious ground floor with an open-plan kitchen, living, and dining area, as well as a guest bedroom with an en-suite bathroom. The first floor boasts three expansive en-suite bedrooms, each with uninterrupted sea views, providing a sense of tranquility and refined comfort.

With its prime location and exceptional design, Myriel Villa is the perfect retreat for those seeking a prestigious coastal lifestyle.

Ester Villas – Contemporary Living with Breathtaking Views

Perched on the scenic hills of Yeroskipou, Ester Villas comprises two stunning detached residences, designed to capture natural light, sweeping sea views, and breathtaking sunsets through expansive windows and spacious balconies.

Blending modern elegance with functional design, each villa features clean architectural lines and an open-plan layout seamlessly connecting the kitchen, living, and dining areas. A double covered parking area is conveniently positioned at road level, with an external staircase leading to the main entrance.

Each residence offers four spacious bedrooms, including two en-suite, along with five well-appointed bathrooms for ultimate comfort.

A generous front garden provides ample outdoor space, with the option to add a private swimming pool, making Ester Villas the perfect retreat for contemporary living.

title: DREDALINE 15

developer.name: DREDALINE INVESTMENS LTD
developer.description:
Dredaline Construction Development LTD is a dynamically growing family-owned business, founded in 2019 and based in Nicosia, Cyprus. The company specializes in land development, construction, and real estate investments, with a strong focus on high-quality residential projects.

The company’s story begins with Christos Iacovou, who started his professional journey as a contractor, bringing over 40 years of experience in the construction industry. His son, Nikolas Iacovou, a civil engineer, later joined him, and together they established Dredaline Construction Development LTD—combining extensive experience with modern expertise and a shared vision for growth.

The company is composed of a well-qualified and trusted team of professionals, who work with consistency, integrity, and dedication to achieving the goals of its clients. Dredaline Construction Development LTD is distinguished by its client-centric approach, construction quality, ongoing customer support, and commitment to building long-term relationships based on trust.

The company is officially registered as a Class C building contractor and has successfully completed numerous residential units, actively contributing to the improvement of Cyprus’s urban landscape.

Dredaline Construction Development LTD envisions delivering projects of high aesthetic and functional value, with unwavering dedication to quality, reliability, and meeting the individual needs of each client.

Located in a quiet area with direct access to the center of Nicosia via the Nicosia–Troodos highway, this development is close to all essential amenities, including schools, supermarkets, bakeries, banks, and shops. It is also within close proximity to Nicosia Mall and Pascal Private School.

The project consists of two houses designed for couples looking to start a family in a peaceful and newly developed neighborhood. Each home features a spacious covered veranda and a backyard, ideal for relaxation and outdoor living. The ground floor offers a modern and functionally designed kitchen that flows into an open-plan living area, along with a guest WC.

Upstairs, there are three bedrooms, one of which includes an en-suite shower and WC. In addition, there is a dedicated laundry room and a spacious main bathroom serving the other two bedrooms.

Both houses will be finished with a certified external thermal insulation system, 8 cm in thickness, ensuring energy efficiency and comfort throughout the year.

F.G Fotiou Developments & Constructions Ltd is a premier construction company in Cyprus, renowned for its commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. With nearly 40 years of experience, the company has successfully delivered over 1,000 residential projects, blending modern architectural design with meticulous craftsmanship. Their team of skilled professionals, including engineers and architects, ensures each project is completed on time and to the highest standards. F.G Fotiou emphasizes using top-tier materials and competitive pricing, making them a trusted name in Cyprus's real estate and construction industry.

To truly understand the F.G Fotiou Developments & Construction Ltd culture is to know its history, rooted in passion and a strong sense of purpose. The story begins in 1980 when Fotos Fotiou, leveraging his extensive experience in the construction industry and family support, founded the company in Limassol. Initially focused on constructing small houses, he transitioned from contractor to developer, building a thriving business. His dedication to serving customers and pushing industry boundaries has driven the company's success and established it as a leader in Cyprus’s construction sector.

Choosing F.G Fotiou Developments & Constructions Ltd means benefiting from proven experience, exceptional service, and honest advice. With over 30 years of expertise and a portfolio that includes some of Cyprus's most high-profile clients, we offer unparalleled industry knowledge. Our extensive network of trusted specialists ensures flawless project execution, while 80% of our clients come from word-of-mouth referrals, reflecting our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction. We prioritize building lasting relationships, founded on honesty and integrity, ensuring long-term success for both clients and suppliers.

description:
A complex of four 2+ bedroom apartments, two one-bedroom apartments, and two 3-bedroom penthouses with private gardens and rooftop Jacuzzis. The project is located in one of Limassol’s most prestigious areas – Agios Athanasios. Residents of the complex enjoy large parking spaces, storage rooms, and stunning sea views.

The apartments have been designed to offer spacious and bright living areas: the living rooms with open kitchens feature large patio doors, and all apartments include at least one bedroom with a large wardrobe and a private bathroom. Each apartment will be finished with great care and attention to the selection of materials. Kitchens will be equipped with state-of-the-art appliances from top brands, while bathrooms will feature ceramic tiles and innovative fixtures.

The building boasts elegant façades covered with alucobond in a light shade. The deliberately asymmetric arrangement of openings gives movement and depth to the building’s volume, accentuated by niches that maximize the view from inside the rooms. Full-height windows ensure maximum brightness, while shading and sun protection are provided by beautifully designed blinds and curtains. Very light and elegant glass railings protect the view.

The modern façade, surrounded by alternating transparent windows and solid metal elements, forms the basis for the living volume above. The materials provide a strong aesthetic impact and elegance: wood, metal, and glass, skillfully combined in an innovative concept. Large terraces allow residents to enjoy views of the sea and city while offering privacy away from the noise of the city.

title: LYRA

developer.name: DOMENICA GROUP
developer.description:
Domenica Group was founded in 1961 as a building construction company and set up by the late Mr. George Hadjidemosthenous.

During its first years the company was involved in both the public and the private sector, developing properties, villas, schools, road works and executing project for the electricity authority, the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Interior.

After the Turkish invasion of 1974 and being a class “A” construction firm, it was involved in the restoration of the island. It was appointed to develop projects for Banks, Municipalities, Organisations and Ministries, including the Ministry of Defence, something that only a handful of companies in Cyprus have experience with.

The large number of commercial and residential properties in Pafos and Limassol are further proof of high standards of quality and reliability. From apartments to luxury penthouses, from townhouses to individual villas in superb locations Domenica Group has something to suit every individual and lifestyle.

Today, Domenica Group is one of the largest property developer in Pafos. The Group currently occupies approximately 480 employees throughout seven different companies, having currently a huge amount of properties available.

Besides Real Estate & Property Development, the Group is also active in the Tourist sector owing a number of Hotels in Pafos and Ayia Napa. The Group’s Travel Agency offers ideal tourist and investment tours and services. The Property Rental & Management Company binds the services that an Investor is expecting to get.

All properties developed are self-financed by the Group and it prides itself on its flexibility in terms of selling prices and methods of payment due to the lack of the usual constraints or pressures as a direct result of external finance.

Domenica Group is an equivalent of reliability, highest construction standards and respect to the client. Inspired by our principles, values and successful history, we continue our work on becoming the most successful property developer in Cyprus, combining top class quality with the highest levels of customer satisfaction.

developer.name: DOMENICA GROUP
developer.description:
Domenica Group was founded in 1961 as a building construction company and set up by the late Mr. George Hadjidemosthenous.

During its first years the company was involved in both the public and the private sector, developing properties, villas, schools, road works and executing project for the electricity authority, the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Interior.

After the Turkish invasion of 1974 and being a class “A” construction firm, it was involved in the restoration of the island. It was appointed to develop projects for Banks, Municipalities, Organisations and Ministries, including the Ministry of Defence, something that only a handful of companies in Cyprus have experience with.

The large number of commercial and residential properties in Pafos and Limassol are further proof of high standards of quality and reliability. From apartments to luxury penthouses, from townhouses to individual villas in superb locations Domenica Group has something to suit every individual and lifestyle.

Today, Domenica Group is one of the largest property developer in Pafos. The Group currently occupies approximately 480 employees throughout seven different companies, having currently a huge amount of properties available.

Besides Real Estate & Property Development, the Group is also active in the Tourist sector owing a number of Hotels in Pafos and Ayia Napa. The Group’s Travel Agency offers ideal tourist and investment tours and services. The Property Rental & Management Company binds the services that an Investor is expecting to get.

All properties developed are self-financed by the Group and it prides itself on its flexibility in terms of selling prices and methods of payment due to the lack of the usual constraints or pressures as a direct result of external finance.

Domenica Group is an equivalent of reliability, highest construction standards and respect to the client. Inspired by our principles, values and successful history, we continue our work on becoming the most successful property developer in Cyprus, combining top class quality with the highest levels of customer satisfaction.

In just ten minutes, residents can reach the lively centre of Protaras and the iconic Fig Tree Bay, one of the island’s most awarded beach. Moments away, Paralimni itself offers the perfect blend of modern convenience and traditional charm, making it an ideal place to call home.

Whether you are searching for a permanent residence or a vacation home, Niero City Apartments presents an unparalleled opportunity. It is a project located in the quiet area of Agia Triada in Protaras, which is chosen by many Cypriots and foreigners for permanent residence, as it has many advantages. It offers tranquility and relaxation, while at the same time it is centrally located between Kapparis and Pernera two areas that are active all year round. 

The project Apanema Villas comprises of eleven three bedroom residences, of which ten are semi-detached and one is detached. Each residence has its own private swimming pool and garden, which ensures the privacy of each and every one. 

Taking into account the surrounding area, the exterior design of the residences was done in a way that highlights the natural environment, with wood, metal and stone dominating, creating a modern yet timeless design. The same aesthetic is adopted in the exterior of the pool area where wood blends harmoniously with stone, creating a setting of relaxation and tranquility. In the interiors of the residences of the Apanema Villas project, natural shades prevail, with the design highlighting the contrasts of different materials which blend harmoniously together.   Each residence has an abundance of natural light but also state-of-the-art lighting systems. Designed in a way that offers its residents comfort, each residence stands out for the practicality of its spaces, which makes it ideal not only as a holiday home but also for permanent residence. 

The Apanema Villas project is located in a privileged location. It offers direct access to the motorway that connects all the cities of Cyprus and is only 63km from Larnaca Airport. In addition, it is located 1.2km from the new Paralimni Marina which is expected to be completed by the end of 2024 and will further upgrade the area.  The nearest beach can be found just 800m from the complex. Surrounded by large green spaces, the residential project of Apanema Villas offers its residents contact with nature, while at the same time giving them the advantage of having direct access to a wide range of services. Dozens of restaurants, bars, shops and services operate within 300 metres of the project which allows residents to move around on foot making their daily life even easier.

Initially focused on constructing small houses, he transitioned from contractor to developer, building a thriving business. His dedication to serving customers and pushing industry boundaries has driven the company's success and established it as a leader in Cyprus’s construction sector.

Choosing F.G Fotiou Developments & Constructions Ltd means benefiting from proven experience, exceptional service, and honest advice. Our extensive network of trusted specialists ensures flawless project execution, while 80% of our clients come from word-of-mouth referrals, reflecting our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction. We prioritize building lasting relationships, founded on honesty and integrity, ensuring long-term success for both clients and suppliers.

title: DELEAR VILLAS
features: Provision for air condition in all rooms
description:
In the charming and peaceful neighbourhood of Kapparis in Protaras, surrounded by wide sidewalks, green spaces, and pedestrian-friendly crossings, and just 5 minutes away from the area's picturesque beaches, lies the Delear Villas project. This modern development comprises 16 luxurious three-bedroom villas, complemented by a convenient mini market at the entrance to meet the residents’ daily needs.

Designed with bioclimatic principles and incorporating cutting-edge innovations, the Delear Villas are the perfect choice for those seeking homes that seamlessly blend modern aesthetics with energy efficiency. The project is rated Energy Class A, and each villa features its own independent photovoltaic system.

The minimalist design emphasises natural materials and textures, with striking geometric lines and thoughtfully integrated green spaces. Expansive windows invite natural light to fill the interiors, creating a seamless flow between indoor and outdoor living areas. The pool, open terraces, and lush gardens harmoniously coexist with the interior spaces, offering an atmosphere of relaxation and comfort.

The villas feature spacious, ergonomically designed interiors that ensure practicality and ease of living. Neutral, natural tones enhance the sense of tranquility, serving as a refined backdrop for a home of exceptional style.

Delear Villas are ideal for permanent residence, vacation homes, or investment opportunities. Located in Kapparis, a vibrant area active all year-round, the project is close to a range of amenities, dining options, and several Blue Flag-awarded beaches. In just five minutes, residents can access most of the scenic beaches of Protaras.
Moreover, the project is conveniently located near the New Paralimni Marina, a hub that will feature world-class restaurants and international fashion brands in addition to boat docking. This exciting development is expected to increase the investment value of properties in Kapparis, Agia Triada, and Pernera.

For those seeking a seaside home with the comforts of a modern urban lifestyle, Delear Villas is an exceptional choice. Situated close to Paralimni, the largest urban center of the Free Famagusta Region, residents have access to private and public schools, hospitals, diverse shopping options, restaurants, and cafes. Paralimni also boasts a vibrant cultural calendar all year-round.

Whatever your aspirations, Delear Villas offers a great opportunity to invest in your future and create unforgettable moments in your own unique home!

title: ENIKO MARE

developer.name: DOMENICA GROUP
developer.description:
Domenica Group was founded in 1961 as a building construction company and set up by the late Mr. George Hadjidemosthenous.

During its first years the company was involved in both the public and the private sector, developing properties, villas, schools, road works and executing project for the electricity authority, the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Interior.

After the Turkish invasion of 1974 and being a class “A” construction firm, it was involved in the restoration of the island. It was appointed to develop projects for Banks, Municipalities, Organisations and Ministries, including the Ministry of Defence, something that only a handful of companies in Cyprus have experience with.

The large number of commercial and residential properties in Pafos and Limassol are further proof of high standards of quality and reliability. From apartments to luxury penthouses, from townhouses to individual villas in superb locations Domenica Group has something to suit every individual and lifestyle.

Today, Domenica Group is one of the largest property developer in Pafos. The Group currently occupies approximately 480 employees throughout seven different companies, having currently a huge amount of properties available.

Besides Real Estate & Property Development, the Group is also active in the Tourist sector owing a number of Hotels in Pafos and Ayia Napa. The Group’s Travel Agency offers ideal tourist and investment tours and services. The Property Rental & Management Company binds the services that an Investor is expecting to get.

All properties developed are self-financed by the Group and it prides itself on its flexibility in terms of selling prices and methods of payment due to the lack of the usual constraints or pressures as a direct result of external finance.

Domenica Group is an equivalent of reliability, highest construction standards and respect to the client. Inspired by our principles, values and successful history, we continue our work on becoming the most successful property developer in Cyprus, combining top class quality with the highest levels of customer satisfaction.

Choose from modern 1- and 2-bedroom apartments featuring high-quality finishes and premium on-site amenities, including a fully equipped gym, welcoming lobby, panoramic roof terrace with sea views, swimming pool, and BBQ area, perfect for entertaining and relaxation. 

With breathtaking views of the Mediterranean, Eniko Mare is more than a home, it’s a smart investment and a serene retreat on the Pafos coast. Whether for permanent living, a holiday escape, or a rental opportunity, it’s a place where you can truly live by the sea.

MARINA RIVIERA RESIDENCES BLOCK A’ is located in one of the most exclusive and central areas of Larnaca, very close to the Marina and the city center.

The project consists of 15 modern apartments with smart layouts. The 1st and 2nd floors feature 1-bedroom apartments, while from the 3rd to the 7th floor, there are two independent apartments per floor. The 7th-floor units enjoy private roof gardens with provision for Jacuzzis. 

The building includes a gym, sauna, and provision for a jacuzzi, while the overall project features a communal swimming pool and landscaped park. Each apartment has a covered parking space and a storage room on the ground floor. 

The location is ideal, close to universities, supermarkets, schools, and with immediate access to the highway to all major cities. Additionally, it is just 5 minutes from the Larnaca Nautical Club perfect for canoeing, kayaking, and sailing and 700 meters from Land of Tomorrow.

 MARINA RIVIERA RESIDENCES BLOCK A’ has been designed by our experienced team of architects, engineers, and interior designers. The modern design includes high-quality Italian ceramic finishes, unique glass balconies, and smart layouts that provide spacious living areas, privacy, and beautiful neighborhood views.

Just 3 km from Finikoudes Beach, a few minutes from Metropolis Mall and Makarios III High School, and close to all essential city amenities, the location combines convenience and exclusivity.

The project will feature 12 spacious apartments across three floors, including one- and two-bedroom units, all designed with functional layouts and premium finishes. Particular attention has been given to the upgraded specifications of sanitary fittings, mixers, accessories, tiling, and the overall design of the kitchen and bathroom areas, ensuring high-quality standards and refined aesthetics. 

Designed for comfort, style, and sustainability, the building will feature photovoltaic panels and is planned to achieve an Energy Efficiency Rating A. A modern residential development that reflects smart design, luxury, and a prime location.

The project boasts twenty-two two bedroom with two bathroom apartments – all with spacious and contemporary living areas.

The fourth floor apartments of two bedrooms and two bathrooms benefit from large, covered balconies, plus two rooms on the roof with three bathrooms, exclusive to owners who prefer luxury living. They also enjoy a spacious bar and barbecue area on the roof garden, along with panoramic views of the famous Larnaca Salt Lake. Each apartment includes one parking space and a storage room on the ground level.

The lovely residential neighbourhood is quiet and family orientated surrounded by large luxury houses and residential properties. The project is very near to supermarkets, private schools such as the American Academy and with immediate access to highways to Nicosia, Limassol, Paphos and Ammochostos. The Famous Larnaca Salt Lake and Cineplex Entertainment Complex is in close proximity.

OPAL RESIDENCES has been fully designed and studied by our professional team of Architects, Engineers and Interior Designers. The modern design makes excellent use of features like top quality italian ceramic finish, unique glass balconies and clever layout of living areas designed to offer optional space, privacy and also a view of the prestigious neighbourhood and Famous Larnaca Salt Lake.

The project will have an energy efficiency of grade “A” since photovoltaic panels will be installed on the roof in order to produce renewable energy. The photovoltaic panels through “net metering” will make sure owners benefit from significant savings in electricity consumption.

developer.name: DOMENICA GROUP
developer.description:
Domenica Group was founded in 1961 as a building construction company and set up by the late Mr. George Hadjidemosthenous.

During its first years the company was involved in both the public and the private sector, developing properties, villas, schools, road works and executing project for the electricity authority, the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Interior.

After the Turkish invasion of 1974 and being a class “A” construction firm, it was involved in the restoration of the island. It was appointed to develop projects for Banks, Municipalities, Organisations and Ministries, including the Ministry of Defence, something that only a handful of companies in Cyprus have experience with.

The large number of commercial and residential properties in Pafos and Limassol are further proof of high standards of quality and reliability. From apartments to luxury penthouses, from townhouses to individual villas in superb locations Domenica Group has something to suit every individual and lifestyle.

Today, Domenica Group is one of the largest property developer in Pafos. The Group currently occupies approximately 480 employees throughout seven different companies, having currently a huge amount of properties available.

Besides Real Estate & Property Development, the Group is also active in the Tourist sector owing a number of Hotels in Pafos and Ayia Napa. The Group’s Travel Agency offers ideal tourist and investment tours and services. The Property Rental & Management Company binds the services that an Investor is expecting to get.

All properties developed are self-financed by the Group and it prides itself on its flexibility in terms of selling prices and methods of payment due to the lack of the usual constraints or pressures as a direct result of external finance.

Domenica Group is an equivalent of reliability, highest construction standards and respect to the client. Inspired by our principles, values and successful history, we continue our work on becoming the most successful property developer in Cyprus, combining top class quality with the highest levels of customer satisfaction.

title: CIRVIS

developer.name: DOMENICA GROUP
developer.description:
Domenica Group was founded in 1961 as a building construction company and set up by the late Mr. George Hadjidemosthenous.

During its first years the company was involved in both the public and the private sector, developing properties, villas, schools, road works and executing project for the electricity authority, the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Interior.

After the Turkish invasion of 1974 and being a class “A” construction firm, it was involved in the restoration of the island. It was appointed to develop projects for Banks, Municipalities, Organisations and Ministries, including the Ministry of Defence, something that only a handful of companies in Cyprus have experience with.

The large number of commercial and residential properties in Pafos and Limassol are further proof of high standards of quality and reliability. From apartments to luxury penthouses, from townhouses to individual villas in superb locations Domenica Group has something to suit every individual and lifestyle.

Today, Domenica Group is one of the largest property developer in Pafos. The Group currently occupies approximately 480 employees throughout seven different companies, having currently a huge amount of properties available.

Besides Real Estate & Property Development, the Group is also active in the Tourist sector owing a number of Hotels in Pafos and Ayia Napa. The Group’s Travel Agency offers ideal tourist and investment tours and services. The Property Rental & Management Company binds the services that an Investor is expecting to get.

All properties developed are self-financed by the Group and it prides itself on its flexibility in terms of selling prices and methods of payment due to the lack of the usual constraints or pressures as a direct result of external finance.

Domenica Group is an equivalent of reliability, highest construction standards and respect to the client. Inspired by our principles, values and successful history, we continue our work on becoming the most successful property developer in Cyprus, combining top class quality with the highest levels of customer satisfaction.

title: ELEMENTS

developer.name: DOMENICA GROUP
developer.description:
Domenica Group was founded in 1961 as a building construction company and set up by the late Mr. George Hadjidemosthenous.

During its first years the company was involved in both the public and the private sector, developing properties, villas, schools, road works and executing project for the electricity authority, the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Interior.

After the Turkish invasion of 1974 and being a class “A” construction firm, it was involved in the restoration of the island. It was appointed to develop projects for Banks, Municipalities, Organisations and Ministries, including the Ministry of Defence, something that only a handful of companies in Cyprus have experience with.

The large number of commercial and residential properties in Pafos and Limassol are further proof of high standards of quality and reliability. From apartments to luxury penthouses, from townhouses to individual villas in superb locations Domenica Group has something to suit every individual and lifestyle.

Today, Domenica Group is one of the largest property developer in Pafos. The Group currently occupies approximately 480 employees throughout seven different companies, having currently a huge amount of properties available.

Besides Real Estate & Property Development, the Group is also active in the Tourist sector owing a number of Hotels in Pafos and Ayia Napa. The Group’s Travel Agency offers ideal tourist and investment tours and services. The Property Rental & Management Company binds the services that an Investor is expecting to get.

All properties developed are self-financed by the Group and it prides itself on its flexibility in terms of selling prices and methods of payment due to the lack of the usual constraints or pressures as a direct result of external finance.

Domenica Group is an equivalent of reliability, highest construction standards and respect to the client. Inspired by our principles, values and successful history, we continue our work on becoming the most successful property developer in Cyprus, combining top class quality with the highest levels of customer satisfaction.
